title: Craftable Saddles
description: Adds crafting recipes for saddles, horse armor and name tags
body:
This simple mod adds crafting recipes for Saddles, horse armor and name tags. For servers, this mod is only required server-side to work. But I suggest adding it to client-side modpacks too, so single player worlds also work.
Recipies

![Crafting recipe for a Saddle](https://gitlab.com/456Xander/craftable-saddles/-/raw/master/recipe-examples/saddle.png) ![Crafting recipe for Iron Armor](https://gitlab.com/456Xander/craftable-saddles/-/raw/master/recipe-examples/iron_armor.png) ![Crafting recipe for a Name Tag](https://gitlab.com/456Xander/craftable-saddles/-/raw/master/recipe-examples/name_tag.png) Other horse armor is crafted the in the same way Iron Horse Armor can be crafted, just replace the iron with gold or diamonds.
